title: OpenSSF Scorecard result
description: JSON result document produced by `scorecard --format json`. The OpenSSF project does not publish a JSON Schema for this format; this schema is transcribed from the Go types in ossf/scorecard (pkg/scorecard, jsonScorecardResultV2) so that Scorecard output can be embedded as evidence and validated. Keep in step with upstream when Scorecard adds fields.

date.description: Date the scan ran. Scorecard emits YYYY-MM-DD, not RFC 3339.

name.description: Repository URI without scheme, e.g. github.com/vulnetix/cli.

commit.description: Commit SHA the scan was performed against.

scorecard.description: Version of the Scorecard tool that produced the result.

score.description: Aggregate score across all checks, 0-10. -1 means the aggregate could not be computed.

checks.description: One entry per Scorecard check that ran.

name.description: Check name, e.g. Branch-Protection, Code-Review, Signed-Releases, Pinned-Dependencies, Dangerous-Workflow, Token-Permissions, Maintained, SAST, Vulnerabilities, License, Security-Policy, CI-Tests, Fuzzing, Binary-Artifacts, Dependency-Update-Tool, Packaging, Contributors, CII-Best-Practices, Webhooks.

score.description: Check score 0-10. -1 (Inconclusive) means the check could not run or could not reach a verdict; it must never be silently treated as 0.

details.description: Per-finding detail lines. Each is a level-prefixed string, e.g. "Warn: no topLevel permission defined: .github/workflows/release.yml:1". These are the enumerable evidence items behind the check's score.
